title: Decision: Ordered registry iteration in from_uri_writable for progressive error specificity
description: from_uri_writable (lines 127–151) iterates registries in three passes: WritableBackendRegistration, then BackendRegistration, then SigningBackendRegistration. This ordering ensures errors are specific and actionable. A caller requesting a writable backend for 'env' first learns 'env is read-only' (not 'unknown backend'). Requesting 'aws-kms' (signing-only) returns 'aws-kms is signing-only', not 'aws-kms is read-only' (both are partially true, but signing-only is more actionable). The ordering rejects increasingly specific backend types, providing the most relevant error for each case. This is superior to single-loop dispatch which would return whichever registration is encountered first, giving inconsistent error messages.
